ticket.title: IMPLEMENT BATCH SYNC OF EXISTING HISTORICAL TRANSACTIONS TO QUICKBOOKS

test_cases.page: QuickBooks Integration - Historical Transaction Batch Sync
test_cases.description: Verify pre-existing historical transactions are successfully created in QuickBooks when batch-synced.
test_cases.expected_result: All sampled historical transactions appear correctly in QuickBooks.

test_cases.page: QuickBooks Integration - Historical Transaction Batch Sync
test_cases.description: Verify synced historical records retain accurate data (dates, amounts, customer, line items).
test_cases.expected_result: All fields match exactly, including original transaction dates.

test_cases.page: QuickBooks Integration - Historical Transaction Batch Sync
test_cases.description: Verify re-running historical batch sync does not create duplicates for already-migrated records.
test_cases.expected_result: No duplicate record created; existing record recognized and skipped.

test_cases.page: QuickBooks Integration - Historical Transaction Batch Sync
test_cases.description: Verify historical batch sync does not disrupt or conflict with live/ongoing sync processes.
test_cases.expected_result: No interference, corruption, or failed sync jobs on either side.
test_cases.actual_result: No conflicts with live sync processes.

test_cases.page: QuickBooks Integration - Historical Transaction Batch Sync
test_cases.description: Verify historical transactions link to correct existing customer records in QuickBooks.
test_cases.expected_result: Transactions correctly linked; no duplicate customer records created.

test_cases.page: QuickBooks Integration - Historical Transaction Batch Sync
test_cases.description: Verify batch sync can process a large volume of historical transactions without timeout.
test_cases.expected_result: Sync completes successfully with all records accounted for.
test_cases.actual_result: Completed without timeout or dropped records.

test_cases.page: QuickBooks Integration - Historical Transaction Batch Sync
test_cases.description: Verify cancelled/refunded historical transactions are excluded or accurately reflect true status.
test_cases.expected_result: Cancelled/refunded transactions excluded or accurately reflected; not shown as valid.

test_cases.page: QuickBooks Integration - Historical Transaction Batch Sync
test_cases.description: Verify individual failed historical records are logged clearly without blocking the rest of the batch.
test_cases.expected_result: Problematic record flagged/logged with clear reason; other valid records still sync successfully.

test_cases.page: QuickBooks Integration - Historical Transaction Batch Sync
test_cases.description: Verify overall consistency between historical transaction records in LakbayHub and QuickBooks.
test_cases.expected_result: All fields match as expected; no unexplained discrepancies.
